tests.title: Cooper Test
tests.description: Run as far as possible in 12 minutes to estimate aerobic capacity.

tests.title: Yo-Yo IR1
tests.description: Intermittent shuttle test used to assess recovery and endurance performance.

tests.title: Beep Test
tests.description: Progressive shuttle run with increasing pace to evaluate aerobic fitness.

tests.title: 2K Row
tests.description: Timed 2000-meter rowing effort to measure endurance and pacing control.

tests.title: 1RM Squat
tests.description: Find the maximum load for one repetition in the back squat.

tests.title: 1RM Bench Press
tests.description: Assess upper-body maximal strength with a one-repetition maximum attempt.

tests.title: Deadlift 3RM
tests.description: Measure posterior chain strength with a heavy 3-rep set.

tests.title: Pull-Up Max Reps
tests.description: Count strict pull-up repetitions to evaluate relative upper-body strength.

tests.title: Overhead Squat Screen
tests.description: Evaluate ankle, hip, thoracic, and shoulder mobility in one movement pattern.

tests.title: Active Straight Leg Raise
tests.description: Check hamstring flexibility and pelvic control with unilateral raises.

tests.title: Shoulder Flexion Wall Test
tests.description: Measure shoulder overhead range while maintaining neutral spine position.

tests.title: Ankle Dorsiflexion Knee to Wall
tests.description: Assess ankle mobility by tracking maximal knee travel over the foot.

tests.title: 10m Sprint
tests.description: Short acceleration sprint to evaluate initial speed and first-step power.

tests.title: 30m Sprint
tests.description: Measure acceleration and transition to maximal running velocity.

tests.title: Flying 20m
tests.description: Track top-speed performance over a timed flying segment.

tests.title: 505 Agility Test
tests.description: Evaluate deceleration and change-of-direction speed under timed conditions.
